10612516.title: Still Open All Hours
10612516.description: Granville has a large quantity of bargain spectacles to sell. Meanwhile, encouraged by reading a self-help book, Mr Newbold decides to tell Mrs Featherstone how he really feels about their relationship, Eric tries to persuade Kath to go on a camping holiday and what is in the large, heavy box that has arrived for Leroy?
